profile.name: v1
profile.ruleContent:
name: "XX建设项目投标文件装订规则"
description: "用于XX建设项目投标文件完整性检查、命名规范校验、页码连续性和签章核验"
version: "1.2"
globalSignatureRequired: false
globalPageRange: null
globalExpiryField: null
globalNamingPattern: "^[\\u4e00-\\u9fa5A-Za-z0-9_\\-]+\\.(pdf|doc|docx|xls|xlsx|png|jpg)$"

sections:
  - name: "一、投标函"
    order: 1
    directory: "01-投标函"
    description: "正本投标函及相关声明文件，全部需要签章"
    signatureRequired: true
    requiredFiles:
      - path: "投标函_签章.pdf"
        description: "正式投标函，必须加盖单位公章及法定代表人签章"
      - path: "法定代表人身份证明_签章.pdf"
        description: "法定代表人身份证明书"
      - path: "法定代表人授权委托书_签章.pdf"
        optional: true
        description: "如投标代表为被授权人则必需"
    namingPatterns:
      - pattern: "^[\\u4e00-\\u9fa5]{2,}_签章\\.(pdf|docx)$"
        label: "中文名_签章.ext"
      - pattern: "^[\\u4e00-\\u9fa5]{2,}(?:_v(\\d+)(?:\\.\\d+)*)?\\.(pdf|docx)$"
        label: "中文名(_v版本号).ext"
        extractVersion: true
        versionGroup: 1
    pageRange: "1-10"
    expiryField: null

  - name: "二、商务资质文件"
    order: 2
    directory: "02-商务资质"
    description: "营业执照、资质证书、ISO认证等，注意有效期检查"
    signatureRequired: false
    requiredFiles:
      - path: "营业执照副本.pdf"
        description: "有效期内的营业执照"
      - path: "资质等级证书.pdf"
        description: "建设行政主管部门颁发的资质证书"
      - path: "安全生产许可证.pdf"
    namingPatterns:
      - pattern: "^[\\u4e00-\\u9fa5]{2,}(?:_v(\\d+)(?:\\.\\d+)*)?\\.(pdf|jpg|png)$"
        label: "中文名(_v版本号).ext"
        extractVersion: true
        versionGroup: 1
    pageRange: "11-35"
    expiryField:
      fieldName: "cert_expiry"
      dateFormat: "YYYY-MM-DD"

  - name: "三、财务状况"
    order: 3
    directory: "03-财务状况"
    description: "近三年经审计的财务报表及银行资信证明"
    requiredFiles:
      - path: "2023年度审计报告.pdf"
      - path: "2022年度审计报告.pdf"
      - path: "2021年度审计报告.pdf"
      - path: "银行资信证明.pdf"
    namingPatterns:
      - pattern: "^(\\d{4})年度[\\u4e00-\\u9fa5]+\\.pdf$"
        label: "年度财务相关"
      - pattern: "^[\\u4e00-\\u9fa5]{2,10}\\.(pdf|xls|xlsx)$"
        label: "中文财务文件"
    pageRange: "36-70"

  - name: "四、类似业绩"
    order: 4
    directory: "04-类似业绩"
    description: "近三年类似项目业绩证明材料，每页合同需关键页"
    requiredFiles:
      - path: "业绩汇总表.xlsx"
    namingPatterns:
      - pattern: "^业绩_\\d{4}_[\\u4e00-\\u9fa5A-Za-z0-9]+\\.pdf$"
        label: "业绩_年份_项目名.pdf"
      - pattern: "^(合同|成交通知|验收)_.*\\.(pdf|jpg|png)$"
        label: "合同/成交通知/验收_xxx"
    pageRange: "71-120"
    allowUntracked: true

  - name: "五、项目管理机构"
    order: 5
    directory: "05-项目管理机构"
    description: "项目班子人员资质、社保证明等"
    signatureRequired: true
    requiredFiles:
      - path: "项目经理简历表_签章.pdf"
      - path: "项目技术负责人简历表_签章.pdf"
    namingPatterns:
      - pattern: "^[\\u4e00-\\u9fa5]{2,}(?:_v(\\d+)(?:\\.\\d+)*)?(?:_签章)?\\.(pdf|docx)$"
        label: "中文名(_v版本号)(_签章).ext"
        extractVersion: true
        versionGroup: 1
      - pattern: "^[\\u4e00-\\u9fa5]{2,}_社保证明\\.pdf$"
        label: "人名_社保证明.pdf"
    pageRange: "121-150"
    expiryField:
      fieldName: "cert_expiry"

  - name: "六、施工组织设计"
    order: 6
    directory: "06-施工组织设计"
    description: "技术方案核心部分，页码必须连续"
    requiredFiles:
      - path: "施工组织设计.pdf"
    namingPatterns:
      - pattern: "^[\\u4e00-\\u9fa5A-Za-z0-9_\\-]+\\.pdf$"
        label: "中文名称.pdf"
    pageRange: "151-280"

  - name: "七、报价文件"
    order: 7
    directory: "07-报价文件"
    description: "报价相关文件，全部需要签章"
    signatureRequired: true
    requiredFiles:
      - path: "报价一览表_签章.pdf"
        signatureRequired: true
      - path: "分项报价表_签章.xlsx"
        signatureRequired: true
      - path: "总价_已签章.pdf"
    namingPatterns:
      - pattern: "^[\\u4e00-\\u9fa5]{2,}_(?:签章|已签章)\\.(pdf|xls|xlsx)$"
        label: "中文名_签章/已签章.ext"
    pageRange: "281-310"
